description: Darcy Denucci coined the term Web 2.0 in 1999 to describe a more interactive Internet where users actively participate and contribute. This shift from the static Web 1.0 to a dynamic, user-generated content environment is exemplified by social media, blogs, and podcasts. Enhanced interactivity allows for personalized experiences through algorithmic recommendations.
topic_summary: Web 2.0 represents the evolution of the Internet from a read-only format to a participatory platform, emphasizing user-generated content and interactivity [t=0:40].
